'''gadubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niacytin|niacytin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niacytin|niacytin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gadubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædibith|gædibith]] || [[word:gædibij|gædibij]] || [[word:gædibish|gædibish]] || [[word:gædibi|gædibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadudubuth|gadudubuth]] || [[word:gadudubuj|gadudubuj]] || [[word:gadudubush|gadudubush]] || [[word:gadudubu|gadudubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadubuth|gadubuth]] || [[word:gadubuj|gadubuj]] || [[word:gadubush|gadubush]] || [[word:gadubu|gadubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadufbuth|gadufbuth]] || [[word:gadufbuj|gadufbuj]] || [[word:gadufbush|gadufbush]] || [[word:gadufbuf|gadufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadubuthu|gadubuthu]] || [[word:gadubuju|gadubuju]] || [[word:gadubushu|gadubushu]] || [[word:gadubuku|gadubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadubuth|gadubuth]] || [[word:gadubuj|gadubuj]] || [[word:gadubush|gadubush]] || [[word:gadubu|gadubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadubuthul|gadubuthul]] || [[word:gadubujul|gadubujul]] || [[word:gadubushul|gadubushul]] || [[word:gadubukul|gadubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadubuthuthu|gadubuthuthu]] || [[word:gadubujuju|gadubujuju]] || [[word:gadubushushu|gadubushushu]] || [[word:gadubuku|gadubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadubuthun|gadubuthun]] || [[word:gadubujun|gadubujun]] || [[word:gadubushun|gadubushun]] || [[word:gadubukun|gadubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadubuthuoro|gadubuthuoro]] || [[word:gadubujuoro|gadubujuoro]] || [[word:gadubushuoro|gadubushuoro]] || [[word:gadubukuoro|gadubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
